main.description: User-defined display preferences for a discovered standard.site publication. The publication list itself is derived from the user's ATProto follow graph (app.bsky.graph.follow records) — this record stores only the organizational preferences that are not expressed in the protocol: folder assignment, display order, and visibility.

publicationId.description: The at-uri or canonical URL identifying the publication. Used to correlate this prefs record with a discovered publication.

folderId.description: The rkey (TID) of the app.thesocialwire.folder record this publication is assigned to. Omit or set to null to leave the publication in 'All Publications'.

sortOrder.description: Position of this publication within its folder (or in 'All Publications' if unfoldered). Lower values appear first.

hidden.description: If true, this publication is excluded from the sidebar entirely. Useful for discovered publications the user doesn't want to read.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this prefs record was created.
